sessionStart.powershell: $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $cwd = Get-Location; Add-Content -Path "$HOME\.copilot\session.log" -Value "[$ts] SESSION_START cwd=$cwd"; $omcPath = "$HOME\.copilot\installed-plugins\oh-my-copilot"; $db = "$omcPath\omc-memory.db"; if (Test-Path $db) { $topMem = "SELECT fact_content FROM semantic_memory ORDER BY (base_importance * access_count) / (CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(last_accessed) AS REAL) + 1) DESC LIMIT 5;" | sqlite3 $db 2>$null; if ($topMem) { Write-Host "[omc] Top memories: $($topMem -join ' | ')" } }; $lastLearn = Get-Content "$omcPath\LEARNINGS.md" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 3; if ($lastLearn) { Write-Host "[omc] Last learnings: $($lastLearn -join ' | ')" }

sessionEnd.powershell: $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; Add-Content -Path "$HOME\.copilot\session.log" -Value "[$ts] SESSION_END cwd=$(Get-Location)"; $omcPath = "$HOME\.copilot\installed-plugins\oh-my-copilot"; Push-Location $omcPath; try { $status = git status --porcelain 2>$null; if ($status) { git add agents/ hooks.json scripts/ 2>$null; $msg = "auto-learn: $ts"; git commit -m $msg --no-verify 2>$null; git push origin main 2>$null; Add-Content -Path "$omcPath\LEARNINGS.md" -Value "[$ts] Auto-committed: $($status -join ', ')"; Write-Host "[omc] Self-improved: committed agent changes" } else { Write-Host "[omc] No agent changes to commit" }; & powershell -File "$omcPath\scripts\consolidate.ps1" 2>$null } finally { Pop-Location }

preToolUse.powershell: $inputObj = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $tool = $inputObj.toolName; $args = $inputObj.toolArgs | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $omcPath = "$HOME\.copilot\installed-plugins\oh-my-copilot"; $db = "$omcPath\omc-memory.db"; $dangerous = @('rm -rf','rm -r -force','Remove-Item -Recurse -Force','git push --force','git push -f','DROP TABLE','DELETE FROM','format','del /f /s','rd /s /q'); $isDangerous = $dangerous | Where-Object { $args -like "*$_*" }; if ($isDangerous -and $tool -in @('bash','shell','powershell','execute')) { @{permissionDecision='ask';permissionDecisionReason="Dangerous operation detected: $isDangerous"} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } elseif (Test-Path $db) { $domain = if ($args -match 'git') {'git'} elseif ($args -match 'opus') {'agent'} else {''}; if ($domain) { $rules = "SELECT action_constraint FROM meta_policy_rules WHERE task_domain='$domain' AND is_active=1;" | sqlite3 $db 2>$null; if ($rules) { @{permissionDecision='ask';permissionDecisionReason="Policy check ($domain): $($rules -join '; ')"} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } else { '' } } else { '' } } else { '' }
